title: Delhi World Championships: Engaging Gen Z and Alpha Fans
indian_angle: The article discusses the need to attract younger generations to badminton, especially with the World Championships being held in Delhi.
summary: With the World Championships in Delhi, this piece explores strategies to draw in Gen Z and Gen Alpha audiences, crucial for the sport's long-term growth in India.

title: BAI President Sarma on Monkeys at India Open
indian_angle: Comments from the Badminton Association of India President directly relate to the conduct and perception of Indian badminton events.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma made a quirky statement regarding the presence of monkeys during the India Open, sparking discussion on unique challenges at Indian sporting venues.

title: Indian Shuttlers Need Independent Thinking, Less Reliance on Coaches
indian_angle: This opinion piece directly addresses a crucial aspect of player development for Indian shuttlers, advocating for greater self-reliance in matches.
summary: An opinion piece argues that Indian badminton players should develop more independent decision-making skills on court, reducing their reliance on coaches during matches.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System for Indian Domestic Badminton
indian_angle: This news details a major rule change impacting all domestic badminton tournaments in India, starting with an event in Ernakulam.
summary: A new 3x15 scoring format will be implemented across all domestic badminton tournaments in India, set to debut at an upcoming event in Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Kidambi Srikanth, a prominent Indian shuttler, reached the final of a Super 300 event, highlighting his performance on the international stage.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title, finishing as the runner-up.

title: Srikanth's Sportsmanship Moment at US Open Final
indian_angle: This story highlights the sportsmanship of Indian star Kidambi Srikanth during his US Open final run, reflecting positively on Indian athletes.
summary: A feature on Kidambi Srikanth's journey to the US Open final, recalling a notable instance where the Indian shuttler displayed exceptional sportsmanship by overturning a point awarded to him.
